title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises!
